## Problem

What's the problem or gap? What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible
today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why this one is better.

## Additional context

Anything else — examples, links, mockups, related issues.
